name: Seafood Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onions and garlic, cook covered over low heat until soft, stirring frequently.
2. Stir in parsley, bell pepper, tomato sauce, wine, water, thyme, rosemary, salt, pepper, and bay leaf.
3. Simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
4. Add crab or white fish, shrimp, scallops, or clams.
5. Cook covered for 8-10 minutes until scallops or clam shells open.
6. Discard any shells that do not open.
